summary: Verified the in-app notification preferences feature end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest in test_notification_prefs.py PASS (auth gate, buyer/seller role filtering, empty/unknown-key 400s, partial-update persistence, toggle-back, mute-skips-insert, enabled-inserts, admin-never-muted, unknown-type-always-delivered, type->category map). Frontend on mobile viewport (390x844): Account tab -> 'Notifications' row navigates to /account/notification-prefs; hero correctly shows 'All categories on'; lists exactly the 6 buyer toggles (orders, returns, reviews, support, back_in_stock, promos) and NO seller_alerts toggle; muting promos optimistically updates hero to '1 category muted' and PUT persists across reload; toggling back restores 'All categories on'; cog icon on /notifications also lands on the prefs screen; back button + 'Critical security alerts...' footer note both present.
critical_code_review_comments: services/notification_prefs.py: _PREFIX_MAP ordering matters (prefix matching is greedy first-hit). 'order_' is listed before 'new_order' / 'proof_of_delivery_uploaded' / 'financing_application' etc., which is fine because those don't start with 'order_'. Verified via test_known_types_resolve_to_categories. No fix needed, but worth noting that any future n_type starting with 'order_' will be bucketed under 'orders' even if it is a seller-side signal.

routers/notifications.py PUT handler: when the client sends only invalid keys, current returns 400 'No valid preference keys provided'. The test docs comment said 'unknown keys ignored' but the implemented (and required-by-spec) behaviour is 400, which matches the test 'test_unknown_keys_ignored'. Consistent.

Frontend account.tsx has a duplicate testID 'account-addresses-btn' on two rows ('Shipping addresses' (line 231) and 'Saved addresses' (line 253)). Not in scope of this feature but worth flagging to main agent — duplicate testIDs can break Playwright/Detox queries.
seed_data_creation: None. Used the existing buyer@example.com test account. Test cleaned up after itself by toggling promos back on at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification prefs feature is fully wired and stable. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_notification_prefs.py (13/13 pass, ~2s). Frontend entry points: Account tab -> 'Notifications' row (testID account-notif-prefs-btn) and /notifications header cog (testID notif-prefs-link). Toggle testIDs follow pattern notif-pref-toggle-<key>. Seller flow not UI-tested but backend pytest covers the seller_alerts role filtering.
